rationale: Migrates the julia-tags.scm tree-sitter query to the newer tree-sitter-julia AST node names (module_definition vs module, signature wrapping for function definitions, type_head for struct/abstract declarations, const_statement for constants). Each rename is a legitimate adaptation to upstream grammar changes. Also updates docs/usage/tips.md grammar ('the aider' to 'aider'), refreshes sample.aider.conf.yml to remove stale OpenAI/Anthropic-only key note and demonstrate the new --api-key provider=key syntax, and adds the new syntax to openrouter docs. Pure docs + grammar maintenance.
